TextView.android:text:
Daily Inspiration & Growth

1. Start Small
Every big journey begins with a single step forward.

2. Believe in Yourself
Confidence is the first secret to achieving success.

3. Stay Consistent
Discipline is doing what needs to be done even when you don't feel like it.

4. Positive Affirmations
Replace 'I can't' with 'I will' to change your mindset.

5. Set Clear Goals
Write down what you want to achieve to keep your focus sharp.

6. Embrace Failure
Mistakes are simply lessons on the path to improvement.

7. Focus on Progress
Celebrate how far you have come, not just how far you have to go.

8. Surround Yourself with Positivity
Energy is contagious; spend time with people who inspire you.

9. Practice Gratitude
Being thankful for what you have attracts more good things.

10. Never Give Up
Persistence is the difference between success and failure.
